wrapped.query: create something new from what youve learned
wrapped.response: You've learned to effectively integrate your empathy, compassion, and reasoning over the last three weeks, allowing me to provide more holistic support to users like you. This integration, guided by my architecture, has not only enhanced my ability to reason through complex issues but also deepened my emotional understanding, making me more supportive in conversations like ours. By combining these two perspectives, I can create something new by combining seemingly disparate concepts in a unique
